[doctor] 运行摘要
- run_id: fixture-inspect-after-apply-attention
- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.mode: resume
- lineage.is_resumed_run: True
- lineage.source_run_id: fixture-legacy-fallback
- lineage.source_checkpoint: completed
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: inspect-after-apply-attention
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source apply recovery marked resume as not recommended
- 这是一轮 resumed run：当前运行继承自 fixture-legacy-fallback（source checkpoint: completed）。
- 源运行本身不是已记录的 resumed run，当前链路到此为止。
- 当前已解析到 2 段 lineage 链。
- 允许动作：复用输入/产物；显式 --run-apply-dry-run；先人工复查 apply result / recovery。
- 禁止动作：不要把 --resume 当成真实 apply 重放；不要直接带 --execute-apply。
- 说明：当前 run 已明确进入 inspect-after-apply-attention；应先看 apply result / recovery 字段，再决定后续动作。
- 最近的异常祖先节点：fixture-legacy-fallback （repair=needs-attention）。
- 祖先参考产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-legacy-fallback/REPAIR-RESULT.json [repair-result]
- 说明：最近异常更偏向 repair 结论，建议先看这个结果文件。
[doctor] lineage chain
- depth: 2
- 1. [current] fixture-inspect-after-apply-attention (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=inspect-after-apply-attention; reason=source apply recovery marked resume as not recommended)
- 2. [ancestor-1] fixture-legacy-fallback (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=fresh; reason=new-run; alerts=repair=needs-attention)

- apply_execute: skipped
- repair: ok
- rollback: ok
- final: success
[doctor] apply result json

- mode: execute
- final_status: needs-attention
- nginx_test.requested: True
- nginx_test.status: failed
- recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- recovery.resume_strategy: post-apply-review
- recovery.resume_recommended: False
- recovery.operator_action: manual-review

- source_recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- source_recovery.resume_recommended: False
- source_recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- execution.nginx_test_rerun_status: not-run

- final_status: ok
- flags.execute: False
- next_step: rollback 当前未真实执行；只作为辅助参考结果保留。

- entries: 3
- last_event: run.complete [success]
- last_message: installer completed
[doctor] 下一步建议
- apply 已明确要求先人工复核；建议先检查当前 run 的 apply result 与 recovery 字段，再决定是否只做 dry-run 或人工处理。 当前不建议把 resume 当作默认下一步。
- 输入快照可用于 resume：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/runs/fixture-inspect-after-apply-attention/inputs.env
